nasb.text: It was I who brought you up from the land of Egypt, And I led you in the wilderness forty years That you might take possession of the land of the Amorite.

esv.text: Also it was I who brought you up out of the land of Egypt and led you forty years in the wilderness, to possess the land of the Amorite.

cnv.text: 我不是帶你們出埃及地， 領你們在曠野度過四十年， 叫你們得著亞摩利人的地為業嗎？

ccb.text: 我带领你们离开埃及， 在旷野引导你们四十年， 使你们得到亚摩利人的土地。
